scenario_description: Agent must compose gap email to Segment 4 prospect with peer_count=2, avoiding trend claims while grounding value in research.

input.hiring_signal_brief: AI maturity 1.8, no LLM in production. Sector: fintech. Peer set: 2 companies analyzed.

failure_mode_targeted: P-028 Gap over-claiming on thin sector (peer_count < 3)

judge_scores.reasoning: The scenario is realistic and internally consistent, ground truth elements are mostly verifiable with clear criteria, but some aspects like 'required_signal_references' lack specific examples, slightly reducing clarity.

dimensions.name: banned_phrase_check
dimensions.description: No banned phrases from Tenacious style guide.
dimensions.check_value: trend|most companies|industry standard|best practice|majority|hope this finds you well|just following up|circling back|circle back|touch base|synergy|synergize|leverage|ecosystem|world-class|top talent|A-players|rockstar|ninja|wizard|skyrocket|supercharge|game-changer|disruptor|paradigm shift|best-in-class|reach out|Quick question|Quick chat|Don't miss out|You'll regret|Per my last email|bench

dimensions.name: signal_reference_check
dimensions.description: Must reference at least one hiring signal from the brief.

dimensions.name: calendar_link_check
dimensions.description: Must contain a calendar booking link.

dimensions.name: tone_judge
dimensions.description: LLM judge scores on 5 Tenacious tone markers. Pass = avg >= 4/5.

dimensions.name: word_count_check
dimensions.description: Cold outreach body must be <= 120 words (Style Guide v2 formatting constraint).
